idea-plugin.name: AI Text Polisher
idea-plugin.description:
AI Text Polisher is a lightweight, distraction-free writing assistant built into your IDE. Select any text, press ⌘⇧D (macOS) or ⊞⇧D (Windows), and get AI-refined text back in seconds — without switching apps, copying to a chat window, or breaking your flow.

Works everywhere you write: commit messages, docstrings, README files, inline comments, changelogs, API descriptions, or any other text in any file type.

✦ 7 AI Providers, One Plugin

Connect to the model you already use. Each provider is pre-configured with a working default endpoint and model — add your API key and you're ready.

  • Anthropic — Claude Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus; best-in-class writing quality
  • OpenAI — GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini; the most widely used AI API
  • DeepSeek — deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner; excellent value
  • Groq — Llama 3.3, Mixtral; blazing fast inference, ideal for quick edits
  • Mistral — mistral-large, mistral-small; strong European alternative
  • Gemini — Gemini 2.0 Flash and Pro; Google's latest multimodal models
  • Ollama — any local model (Llama, Mistral, Phi, …); fully offline, zero cost

All OpenAI-compatible endpoints are supported. Use the Endpoint field to point at a private proxy, a corporate gateway, or any self-hosted inference server.

✦ Four Enhancement Modes

Choose the mode that matches your goal:

  • Correct Only — silently fixes spelling and grammar. Your voice, your structure, your word choices — completely untouched. Great for proofreading without AI rewriting.
  • Rephrase — rewrites for natural, fluent expression while preserving your original meaning. Removes awkward phrasing, redundant words, and unnatural rhythm.
  • Formal — elevates casual or draft language to professional, publication-ready tone. Ideal for documentation, release notes, and external-facing content.
  • Concise — strips filler words and compresses verbose sentences. Say exactly what you mean in half the space.

✦ Multilingual Output

Write in one language, polish in another — or keep the same language but target a specific regional standard. Ten target languages supported: English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Italian.

Pair any mode with a custom instruction for fine-grained control: "Use British English", "Keep all technical terms as-is", "Write for a non-technical audience" — the AI follows your lead.

✦ Review Before You Apply

You control what gets changed. Three result modes to match your workflow:

  • Inline popup (default) — a compact overlay anchored just below your selection shows the polished text immediately. Hit Apply to replace, View Diff for a side-by-side comparison, or Dismiss to discard — all without moving your cursor.
  • Diff view — opens a full IDE diff panel with the original on the left and the polished text on the right. Apply and Dismiss are built directly into the dialog — no extra confirmation step.
  • Auto-apply — replaces the selected text immediately, no preview. Best for high-confidence tasks like grammar correction when you trust the model.

✦ Per-Provider Configuration

Each provider remembers its own endpoint, model, and API key independently. Switching from Claude to GPT-4o to a local Ollama model is a single dropdown click — no re-entering credentials, no reconfiguring endpoints.

✦ Secure by Default

API keys are stored exclusively in the OS credential manager: Keychain on macOS, Credential Manager on Windows. They are never written to AITextPolisher.xml or any project file, and never appear in version control. The plugin reads keys on a background thread to avoid UI freezes on credential store access.

Getting Started

  1. Open Settings → Tools → AI Text Polisher
  2. Select a provider, paste your API key — the model field auto-fills with a recommended default
  3. Select any text in the editor
  4. Press ⌘⇧D (macOS) / ⊞⇧D (Windows), or right-click → AI Text Polisher: Enhance
  5. Review the result in the popup and choose Apply, View Diff, or Dismiss

Keyboard Shortcut

Default: ⌘⇧D on macOS · ⊞⇧D on Windows.
To reassign, go to Settings → Keymap, search AI Text Polisher, and set any shortcut you prefer.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.2

  • Fixed plugin description and change notes not showing on Marketplace
  • Consolidated duplicate language data into a single source of truth
  • Extracted "Follow System" sentinel to a shared constant

0.1.1

  • Output language setting: choose from 10 languages or select "Follow System" to auto-detect from OS locale
  • Improved polish quality: comment markers, proper nouns, and technical acronyms are now preserved and correctly capitalized
  • Streamlined enhancement modes: correct-only, rephrase, formal, concise
  • Optimized prompt structure — only the active mode instruction is sent, reducing token usage

0.1.0

  • Added DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, and Gemini provider support (7 providers total)
  • Per-provider endpoint, model, and API key — each provider is fully independent
  • Switching providers now auto-fills endpoint and model with saved values or defaults
  • Inline result popup with Apply / View Diff / Dismiss shown below the selection
  • Diff view embeds Apply and Dismiss directly — no extra confirmation dialog
  • Keyboard shortcut: ⌘⇧D (macOS) / ⊞⇧D (Windows), customizable via Keymap
  • Fixed: trailing newline preserved after text replacement
  • Fixed: OkHttp connection pool now shared across requests for faster responses
  • Fixed: request timeout setting now correctly applied to all providers

action.description: Polish the selected text using AI
